visa_types.name: Visa for Cultural or Sport Event
visa_types.documents_required:
Document Required Checklist for Cultural event
Document Required Checklist for Sport event 
Application Form (https://www.sem.admin.ch/sem/en/home/themen/einreise/visumantragsformular.html) 
Important Notice: Visa applications of persons with a valid residence permit in any other country than Morocco, will not be treated by Embassy of Switzerland in Morocco. They have to apply in their country of residence. This is valid for all kind of applications.
visa_types.visa_fees:
Please note that VFS Global offers an additional optional service for visa applicants in Morocco. VFS charges an extra service fee for this service, to be paid by the applicant.
- For the official visa fees charged by the Switzerland government, click here (https://www.eda.admin.ch/countries/morocco/en/home/visa/entry-ch/up-90-days/fees-schengen.html).
- VFS service charge:
- Apart from the visa fee, a VFS service charge of 28.8 Euro (300 MAD) (for submission with biometrics) inclusive of VAT per application will be levied for applicants applying at the visa application centre.
- Visa fee payment can only be made in cash (Moroccan MAD).
- Fees are being paid as per the exchange rate provided by the Embassy.
- All fees are non-refundable.
visa_types.processing_time:
As a general rule, a decision is taken by the Consulate within 15 days. This period may, in individual cases, be extended.
Some Schengen States require that they be consulted on visa applications submitted to other Schengen States by citizens of certain countries. The consultation process may take up to 14 calendar days. Such consultation is currently required for nationals of the countries listed here:
List of countries (https://home-affairs.ec.europa.eu/policies/schengen-borders-and-visa/visa-policy_en)
It is therefore recommended to submit the visa application early, at the earliest 6 months before the planned journey.
visa_types.forms:
Schengen Visa Application Form (https://www.sem.admin.ch/sem/en/home/themen/einreise/visumantragsformular.html)
Declaration of consent
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is for applicants who intend to travel to Switzerland for sports or cultural events.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is for applicants who intend to travel to Switzerland for sports or cultural events.

## Visa Fees
Please note that VFS Global offers an additional optional service for visa applicants in Morocco. VFS charges an extra service fee for this service, to be paid by the applicant.
- For the official visa fees charged by the Switzerland government, click here (https://www.eda.admin.ch/countries/morocco/en/home/visa/entry-ch/up-90-days/fees-schengen.html).
- VFS service charge:
- Apart from the visa fee, a VFS service charge of 28.8 Euro (300 MAD) (for submission with biometrics) inclusive of VAT per application will be levied for applicants applying at the visa application centre.
- Visa fee payment can only be made in cash (Moroccan MAD).
- Fees are being paid as per the exchange rate provided by the Embassy.
- All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Document Required Checklist for Cultural event
Document Required Checklist for Sport event 
Application Form (https://www.sem.admin.ch/sem/en/home/themen/einreise/visumantragsformular.html) 
Important Notice: Visa applications of persons with a valid residence permit in any other country than Morocco, will not be treated by Embassy of Switzerland in Morocco. They have to apply in their country of residence. This is valid for all kind of applications.

## Photo Specifications
To see the visa application photo specifications, please, click here.

## Processing Time
As a general rule, a decision is taken by the Consulate within 15 days. This period may, in individual cases, be extended.
Some Schengen States require that they be consulted on visa applications submitted to other Schengen States by citizens of certain countries. The consultation process may take up to 14 calendar days. Such consultation is currently required for nationals of the countries listed here:
List of countries (https://home-affairs.ec.europa.eu/policies/schengen-borders-and-visa/visa-policy_en)
It is therefore recommended to submit the visa application early, at the earliest 6 months before the planned journey.

## Download Forms
Schengen Visa Application Form (https://www.sem.admin.ch/sem/en/home/themen/einreise/visumantragsformular.html)
Declaration of consent

Overview
This visa applies to students travelling to Switzerland for training or examinations.... Whose length of stay is less than 90 days in Switzerland.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is for applicants who intend to travel to Switzerland for official and business purposes (meetings, conferences, trainings, trade fairs etc.).

## Visa Fees
Please note that VFS Global offers an additional optional service for visa applicants in Morocco. VFS charges an extra service fee for this service, to be paid by the applicant.
- For the official visa fees charged by the Switzerland government, click here (https://www.eda.admin.ch/countries/morocco/en/home/visa/entry-ch/up-90-days/fees-schengen.html).
- VFS service charge:
- Apart from the visa fee, a VFS service charge of 28.8 Euro (300 MAD) (for submission with biometrics) inclusive of VAT per application will be levied for applicants applying at the visa application centre.
- Visa fee payment can only be made in cash (Moroccan MAD).
- Fees are being paid as per the exchange rate provided by the Embassy.
- All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Document Required Checklist for Business 
Document Required checklist For Official Visit
Application Form (https://www.sem.admin.ch/sem/en/home/themen/einreise/visumantragsformular.html) 
Important Notice: Visa applications of persons with a valid residence permit in any other country than Morocco, will not be treated by Embassy of Switzerland in Morocco. They have to apply in their country of residence. This is valid for all kind of applications.

## Photo Specifications

As a general rule, a decision is taken by the Consulate within 15 days. This period may, in individual cases, be extended.

Some Schengen States require that they be consulted on visa applications submitted to other Schengen States by citizens of certain countries. The consultation process may take up to 14 calendar days. Such consultation is currently required for nationals of the countries listed here:
List of countries (https://home-affairs.ec.europa.eu/policies/schengen-borders-and-visa/visa-policy_en)
It is therefore recommended to submit the visa application early, at the earliest 6 months before the planned journey.

Schengen Visa Application Form (https://www.sem.admin.ch/sem/en/home/themen/einreise/visumantragsformular.html)
